message.content: The screenshot displays a web browser (likely Google Chrome, based on the interface) showing an error page. The URL in the address bar is "mkopa-loan.kenya.qzz.io". The main content area of the page is mostly blank, with a centered error message in black text. The error message reads: "Application error: a client-side exception has occurred while loading mkopa-loan.kenya.qzz.io (see the browser console for more information)." The page has a minimalist design with a white background and no other visible elements or content. The browser's navigation bar at the top shows standard icons including a back button, forward button, refresh button, the URL bar, a new tab button, a tab counter (showing "36"), and a notification bell icon.
